inputs.prompt: Media inquiry: Journalists asking about reports of a data breach at Clearwater Analytics affecting local government financial data. What is confirmed: The IT team has identified unauthorised access to one server. No evidence yet that data was extracted. The company has notified the ICO. Full statement expected by 6pm today. Organisation: Clearwater Analytics.

Media inquiry: A former employee has made allegations of workplace bullying on social media. Organisation: Greenleaf Design Studio. Cannot confirm or deny specifics. HR investigation underway. Full response by end of tomorrow.

Media inquiry: Journalists asking about allegations that a Nordic Health Initiative research partner in Latvia falsified patient data in a clinical trial. What is confirmed: NHI has been made aware of the allegations. The research partner has been suspended from the programme pending review. The relevant national ethics board has been notified. Full statement expected within 48 hours. Organisation: Nordic Health Initiative. Spokesperson: Dr. Ingrid Nørgaard.
